description: Following a product return, a credit memo must be issued to the customer for the value of the returned goods.

nodes.task_description: Find the original invoice that corresponds to the returned product.
Verify in the inventory system that the returned goods have been received and are in good condition.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the return receipt has been processed by the warehouse.

nodes.task_description: Create a credit memo for the value of the returned items, which the customer can apply to a future payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the credit memo and applies it to the customer's account.
